scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: correct run() signature with params, Task attributes (results, success, status, stdout, stderr, return_code, log, message, id). Slightly different framing on error handling (auto-raise vs manual) but core content is accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is mentioned but not in gold standard and may not exist — gold standard states juju.run() auto-raises TaskError on failure rather than requiring a manual call. Minor potential fabrication.
